steps.title: Find the specific detail signal
steps.content: The second sentence tells exactly how Latimer improved the bulb—by placing cardboard around its carbon filament—so the transition must introduce a specific example or clarification.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
‘Specifically,’ introduces a precise detail that explains the earlier claim of improvement, making the logical link clear.
The other three choices either indicate time (‘Soon,’), concession (‘Regardless,’), or contrast (‘However,’), none of which fit the explanatory relationship.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
